zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Harman於1406年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特時，她的父親Dun Harmon27歲，母親Mrs. Dun Harmon22歲。她於1427年與Sir Richard Whiting在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1457年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特享年51歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Harman于1406年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特时，她的父亲Dun Harmon27岁，母亲Mrs. Dun Harmon22岁。她于1427年与Sir Richard Whiting在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1457年在英国英格兰薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特享年51岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Harman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southeast), Dutch, and Czech: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’ (see Hermann ). In England this name was introduced by the Normans.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): perhaps a nickname for someone with a copious or noticeable head of hair (see   Haar  ).

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Harman was born in 1406, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, her father, Dun Harmon, was 27 and her mother, Mrs. Dun Harmon, was 22. She married Sir Richard Whiting in 1427, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1457, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Harman est née en 1406, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Dun Harmon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Dun Harmon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Whiting en 1427, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1457, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Harman 1406 in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dun Harmon 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Dun Harmon 22. Sie hat 1427 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Whiting geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1457 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Harmanが1406年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットで生まれた時，父Dun Harmonは27歳，母Mrs. Dun Harmonは22歳であった。1427年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでSir Richard Whitingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1457年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットで51歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Harman(이)가 1406년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dun Harmon(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Dun Harmon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Sir Richard Whiting(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Whiting em 1427, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Harman родилась в 1406 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Dun Harmon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Dun Harmon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Whiting в 1427 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1457 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия.
